zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Longchamp II於大約1144年出生在英國賀福爾維爾頓時，他的父親Hugh de Longchamp I28歲，母親Eve de Lacy25歲。他於大約1155年與Emma St Leger結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1194年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Longchamp II于大约1144年出生在英国賀福爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Hugh de Longchamp I28岁，母亲Eve de Lacy25岁。他于大约1155年与Emma St Leger结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1194年在他的家乡享年51岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Longchamp II was born about 1144, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, his father, Hugh de Longchamp I, was 28 and his mother, Eve de Lacy, was 25. He married Emma St Leger about 1155. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1194, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Longchamp II est né environ 1144, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Longchamp I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eve de Lacy, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Emma St Leger environ 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1194, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Longchamp II um 1144 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Longchamp I 28 und seine Mutter Eve de Lacy 25. Er hat um 1155 Emma St Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1194 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Longchamp II è nato il circa 1144 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Longchamp I, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eve de Lacy, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Emma St Leger circa 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1194, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Longchamp IIが約1144年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Longchamp Iは28歳，母Eve de Lacyは25歳であった。約1155年にEmma St Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Longchamp II(이)가 대략 1144년 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Longchamp I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eve de Lacy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1155년 Emma St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ross On Wye, Herefordshire, England: Ross-on-Wye, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Longchamp II nasceu aproximadamente 1144, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Longchamp I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eve de Lacy, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma St Leger aproximadamente 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1194, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Longchamp II родился около 1144 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Longchamp I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve de Lacy, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma St Leger около 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1194 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Longchamp II nació aproximadamente 1144, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Longchamp I, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eve de Lacy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Emma St Leger aproximadamente 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1194, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
